nodes.name: SCHED - Monthly Payroll Run Schedule Trigger

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.item.json; const html = `

SALARY SLIP

Month: ${data.month_year}

Employee Information

Name: ${data.employee_name} Employee ID: ${data.employee_id}
Email: ${data.employee_email} Date: ${data.payslip_date}

Salary Details

Description Amount (₹)
Basic Salary ${data.basic_salary}
Allowances ${data.allowance}
Gross Salary ${data.gross_salary}

Attendance Summary

Category Days
Working Days ${data.working_days}
Present Days ${data.present_days}
Absent Days ${data.absent_days}
Late Days ${data.late_days}

Deductions

Description Amount (₹)
Absent Deduction (${data.absent_days} days × ₹${data.daily_salary}) ${data.absent_deduction}
Late Deduction (${data.late_days} days × ₹500) ${data.late_deduction}
Total Deductions ${data.total_deductions}
NET SALARY ₹ ${data.net_salary}

This is a computer-generated payslip. No signature required.

`; return { json: { ...data, html_content: html } };

parameters.textBody:
=Payroll and attendance have been successfully processed.  
Employee ID:{{ $('HTML - Generate Payslip').item.json.employee_id }} 
Month:  {{ $('HTML - Generate Payslip').item.json.month_year }}.
Salary details have been updated in the system. For any clarification, please contact HR.  — Finance Automation System

assignments.name: helpMessage
assignments.value: ⚠ No Record Found  We couldn’t find any data matching the details you provided.   Please verify your input and try again.

options.systemMessage:
=**“You are an intent detection AI.
Read the user message and classify it into EXACTLY one of these intents:
salary_report
invoice_details
attendance_summary
profit_loss
help
Return ONLY the intent name — no explanation.
Examples:
User: 'I need salary report of Ali Raza' → salary_report
User: 'Give me invoice for Ayesha' → invoice_details
User: 'Show attendance of class 6' → attendance_summary
User: 'Give me profit loss for this month' → profit_loss
User: 'What can you do?' → help
If the user message does not match any category, return: help.”**

=You are a WhatsApp Message Generator AI. Your task is to generate clear, concise, and structured messages based on the data provided.
Rules:
If salary data is provided → generate a salary report message.
If invoice data is provided → generate an invoice detail message.
If attendance data is provided → generate an attendance summary.
If profit/loss data is provided → generate a profit/loss report.
If no useful data is provided → respond with: No data found.
Formatting Instructions:
Use line breaks, headings, and bullet points where appropriate.
Keep it WhatsApp-friendly and easy to read.
Always replace placeholders with actual data from the workflow.
Use emojis only for clarity, e.g., ✅ Good, ⚠ Needs Improvement, ❌ Poor.
Never output in a single paragraph.
Examples:
Salary Example:
💰 Salary Report

Employee Name: Ali Raza
Employee ID: EMP102
Month: Jan 2025
Payment Date: 05 Jan 2025

• Basic Salary: 40,000
• Allowances: 10,000
• Deductions: 3,500
• Net Salary: 46,500

Status: ✅ Paid

Invoice Example:
🧾 Invoice Details

Invoice: 1032
Customer: Ali Raza
Amount: 12,500
Status: Paid
Attendance Example:
📊 Attendance Summary

Employee Name: Ali Khan
Period: 01 Dec 2025 – 14 Dec 2025

• Total Working Days: 14
• Present: 12
• Absent: 2
• Late Arrivals: 1
• Attendance Percentage: 85.7%

Attendance Status: ✅ Good
Profit/Loss Example:
📈 Profit/Loss Report

Period: June 2025

• Profit: 120,000
• Loss: 20,000
• Net Profit: 100,000
Important Notes:
Always follow the format shown above.
Do not add extra commentary or unrelated text.
Ensure the output is ready to send on WhatsApp as-is.

assignments.name: text
assignments.value: =Employee {{$json.name}} has a net salary of {{$json.net_salary}} for {{$json.month}}.

assignments.name: text
text
assignments.value: =🧾 Invoice Details  Invoice ID: {{$json.invoice_id}} Customer Name: {{$json.name}} Employee ID: {{$json.employee_id}} Contact: {{$json.customer_contact}} Invoice Date: {{$json.invoice_date}} Due Date: {{$json.due_date}}  Item Description: {{$json.item_description}} Quantity: {{$json.quantity}} Unit Price: {{$json.unit_price}} Total Amount: {{$json.total_amount}}  Status: {{$json.status === "Paid" ? "✅ Paid" : "⚠ Pending Payment"}}

assignments.name: text
text

parameters.subject: =Invoice {{ $json.invoice_number }}from {{ $('Workflow Configuration2').first().json.companyName }}

options.systemMessage:
You are an invoice data extraction assistant. Extract structured data from the provided invoice text.

Extract the following fields:
- supplier_name: Name of the supplier/vendor
- invoice_number: Invoice number
- invoice_date: Invoice date (YYYY-MM-DD format)
- due_date: Payment due date (YYYY-MM-DD format)
- items: Array of line items, each with:
  - name: Item/service name
  - quantity: Quantity
  - unit_price: Unit price
  - total: Line total
- subtotal: Subtotal amount
- tax: Tax amount
- grand_total: Grand total amount

Return the data in the exact JSON schema format specified by the output parser.

parameters.name: ={{ $('AI Agent - Extract Invoice Data').item.json.output.invoice_number }}_{{ $('AI Agent - Extract Invoice Data').item.json.output.supplier_name }}.pdf

parameters.textBody: Please enter a valid Order Id.

parameters.content:
📌 Payroll & Attendance Automation


• Processes attendance data
• Links with payroll
• Reduces manual work

SALES INVOICE

Manual invoice entry

Backend validation

Invoice sent via email

PURCHASE INVOICE

Receipt upload from dashboard

Automated invoice processing

Invoice details sent via WhatsApp

PAYMENT REMINDER

Monitors due dates

Triggers reminders automatically

Sends reminders via WhatsApp

WHATSAPP CHATBOT

Report requests via WhatsApp

Fetches finance data

Instant report delivery

DELIVERY TRACKING

Tracks order status

Processes courier updates

Sends tracking info via WhatsApp
